message: fix(ci): Disable benchmarks on PRs - run only on main push and nightly

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,6 @@
 name: Performance Benchmarks
 
 on:
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main, develop]
-    paths:
-      - 'packages/**'
-      - 'benchmarks/**'
-      - '.github/workflows/benchmarks.yml'
   push:
     branches: [main]
   schedule:
